title: Recipe Fixer
description: A simple mod to fix various problems with recipes.
body:
# Recipe Fixer

## Description

This mod, created by Mysticpasta1, helps prevent recipe conflicts and other connection issues. It's especially useful when using multiple mods that may cause broken crafting recipes.

### Prevent these problems:

- Invalid or corrupted recipes.
- Ignore broken shaped and shapeless recipes to avoid invalid packets.
- Invalid tag id: X

### Feel free to use this mod on your modpack
